channel.title: StrikeZone Cricket League Updates
channel.description: Latest updates from StrikeZone Cricket League, with a focus on services and the founder's journey.

item.title: StrikeZone Services Overview
item.description: Explore StrikeZone's services, including fixture management, live score updates, matchday standards, and player development tracking.

item.title: Founder's Journey and League Mission
item.description: Read how the founder's journey shaped StrikeZone's mission to deliver meaningful youth cricket opportunities in Johannesburg.

item.title: About StrikeZone Cricket League
item.description: Learn about StrikeZone's approach to youth cricket development from U9 to U18.
